lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਹਜ ਲਾਗਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: man tan seetal saant sehaj laagaa prabh kee sev |
lines.english: My mind and body are cooled and soothed, in intuitive peace and poise; I have dedicated myself to serving God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੂਟੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਸਫਲ ਪੂਰਨ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ttootte bandhan bahu bikaar safal pooran taa ke kaam |
lines.english: One who meditates in remembrance on the Name of the Lord - his bonds are broken, all his sins are erased,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਿਟੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਛੁਟੀ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: duramat mittee haumai chhuttee simarat har ko naam |
lines.english: and his works are brought to perfect fruition; his evil-mindedness disappears, and his ego is subdued.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਨਿ ਗਹੀ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕੀ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਆਵਾ ਗਵਨ ॥
lines.translit: saran gahee paarabraham kee mittiaa aavaa gavan |
lines.english: Taking to the Sanctuary of the Supreme Lord God, his comings and goings in reincarnation are ended.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਟਹਲ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਜਪੀਐ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: har kee ttehal kamaavanee japeeai prabh kaa naam |
lines.english: I serve the Lord, and I chant the Name of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮੁ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: gur poore te paaeaa naanak sukh bisraam |15|
lines.english: From the Perfect Guru, Nanak has obtained peace and comfortable ease. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰਿਆ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਸਿਉ ਗੁਣ ਗੁਬਿੰਦ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਰਵਨ ॥
lines.translit: aap tariaa kuttanb siau gun gubind prabh ravan |
lines.english: He saves himself, along with his family, chanting the Praises of God, the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨੁ ਕਬਹੁ ਨ ਡੋਲਤਾ ਪੂਰਾ ਕੀਆ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: pooran kabahu na ddolataa pooraa keea prabh aap |
lines.english: The perfect person never wavers; God Himself made him perfect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨਮਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਏਕੁ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: pooranamaa pooran prabh ek karan kaaran samarath |
lines.english: The day of the full moon: God alone is Perfect; He is the All-powerful Cause of causes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨੁ ਦਿਨੁ ਚੜੈ ਸਵਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਹੋਤ ਨ ਘਾਟਿ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: din din charrai savaaeaa naanak hot na ghaatt |16|
lines.english: Day by day, he prospers; O Nanak, he shall not fail. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੁਰ ਕੀਆ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gun nidhaan gobind gur keea jaa kaa hoe |
lines.english: He is the Treasure of Excellence, the Lord of the Universe; through the Guru, He acts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਦਇਆਲ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਹਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant deaal purakh sabh aoopar jaa kaa hath |
lines.english: The Lord is kind and compassionate to all beings and creatures; His Protecting Hand is over all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਹਾਈ ਸਰਨਿ ਜੋਗੁ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਨਮਸਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sant sahaaee saran jog aatth pehar namasakaar |
lines.english: He is the Support of His Saints, with the Power to give Sanctuary. Twenty-four hours a day, I bow in reverence to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੋ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਨਣਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham paramesaro sabh bidh jaananahaar |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord, is the Knower of all ways and means.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੁਜਾਨੁ ਅਲਖ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: antarajaamee prabh sujaan alakh niranjan soe |
lines.english: God, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, is All-knowing, Unseen and Immaculately Pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਨ ਅਨਾਥ ਨਾਥ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਸਰਨ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: patit udhaaran anaath naath naanak prabh kee saran |16|
lines.english: He is the Saving Grace of sinners, the Master of the masterless; Nanak has entered God's Sanctuary. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਨਹ ਬੂਝੀਐ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ॥
lines.translit: akath kathaa neh boojheeai simarahu har ke charan |
lines.english: His Unspoken Speech cannot be understood; I meditate on the Feet of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸਹਸਾ ਗਇਓ ਸਰਨਿ ਗਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh binase sahasaa geo saran gahee har raae |
lines.english: My pain is gone, and my sorrows have departed, since I took to the Sanctuary of the Lord, my King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਚਿੰਦੇ ਫਲ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: man chinde fal paaeaa naanak har gun gaae |17|
lines.english: I have obtained the fruits of my mind's desires, O Nanak, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਗਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਸੁਣੈ ਕੋਈ ਕਰੈ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koee gaavai ko sunai koee karai beechaar |
lines.english: Some sing, some listen, and some contemplate;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋ ਉਪਦੇਸੈ ਕੋ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੈ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਹੋਇ ਉਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: ko upadesai ko drirrai tis kaa hoe udhaar |
lines.english: some preach, and some implant the Name within; this is how they are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਕਾਟੈ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਮਲੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kilabikh kaattai hoe niramalaa janam janam mal jaae |
lines.english: Their sinful mistakes are erased, and they become pure; the filth of countless incarnations is washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸੂਰਾ ਕੁਲਵੰਤੁ ਸੋਇ ਜਿਨਿ ਭਜਿਆ ਭਗਵੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: so sooraa kulavant soe jin bhajiaa bhagavant |
lines.english: They are spiritual heros, of noble birth, who vibrate upon the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤਿ ਪਲਤਿ ਮੁਖੁ ਊਜਲਾ ਨਹ ਪੋਹੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: halat palat mukh aoojalaa neh pohai tis maae |
lines.english: In this world and the next, their faces shall be radiant; they shall not be touched by Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸੁਰਤਾ ਸੋ ਬੈਸਨੋ ਸੋ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਧਨਵੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: so surataa so baisano so giaanee dhanavant |
lines.english: They are intuitively wise, and they are Vaishnaavs, worshippers of Vishnu; they are spiritually wise, wealthy and prosperous.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਤ੍ਰੀ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣੁ ਸੂਦੁ ਬੈਸੁ ਉਧਰੈ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਚੰਡਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: khatree braahaman sood bais udharai simar chanddaal |
lines.english: The Kh'shatriyas, the Brahmins, the low-caste Soodras, the Vaisha workers and the outcast pariahs are all saved,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਾਨਿਓ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਨਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਰਵਾਲ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: jin jaanio prabh aapanaa naanak tiseh ravaal |17|
lines.english: meditating on the Lord. Nanak is the dust of the feet of those who know his God. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree kee vaar mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Vaar In Gauree, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖਦਾ ਮਨ ਭਾਵਨੀ ਤੇ ਸਿਧਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ek drisatt kar dekhadaa man bhaavanee te sidh hoe |
lines.english: He looks upon all impartially; with pure faith in the mind, He is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਸਮਤੁ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh deaal hai jis no samat sabh koe |
lines.english: The True Guru, the Primal Being, is kind and compassionate; all are alike to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kirapaa te har dhiaaeeai guramukh paavai koe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, by His Grace, one meditates on the Lord; the Gurmukhs obtain Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਚਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਉਤਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਦੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur vich amrit hai har utam har pad soe |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Nectar is within the True Guru; He is exalted and sublime, of Godly status.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਖਟਿਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa har dhan khattiaa guramukh sabad veechaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh earns the profit of the wealth of the Lord's Name, contemplating the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਸਭ ਬਿਖੁ ਹੈ ਨਿਤ ਜਗਿ ਤੋਟਾ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maaeaa sabh bikh hai nit jag tottaa sansaar |
lines.english: Egotism and Maya are total poison; in these, people continually suffer loss in this world.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਬਿਖੁ ਉਤਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mail bikh utarai har amrit har ur dhaar |
lines.english: The poisonous filth of egotism is removed, when one enshrines the Ambrosial Name of the Lord within the heart.
